mapper.select: SELECT * FROM practice_problems ORDER BY problem_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO practice_problems ( subject_id, node_id, problem_type, question, answer_text, difficulty_code, created_by, is_active, created_at ) VALUES ( #{subjectId}, #{nodeId}, #{problemType}, #{question}, #{answerText}, #{difficultyCode}, #{createdBy}, #{isActive}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE practice_problems SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, node_id = #{nodeId}, problem_type = #{problemType}, question = #{question}, answer_text = #{answerText}, difficulty_code = #{difficultyCode}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.select: SELECT problem_id, subject_id, node_id, problem_type, question, answer_text, difficulty_code, created_by, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM practice_problems WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND difficulty_code = #{difficultyCode} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 10
